reason: This is a poetic Arabic text about waiting for loved ones, comparing branches waiting for migrating birds to hearts waiting for absent loved ones. Contains no ISIS-related content or extremist messaging.
original_post: كَمْ مِنْ الأَغصَانْ تَنتظِر طُيورٌ مَهاجِرهْ وَكمْ مِنْ القُلوبْ تَنتظِر أَحَباباً غَائِبونْ ‼
